sql_array: CREATE TABLE hyperbolic_tangents (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, angle DOUBLE PRECISION, tanh_value DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO hyperbolic_tangents (angle, tanh_value) VALUES (1.4, tanh(1.4));
INSERT INTO hyperbolic_tangents (angle, tanh_value) VALUES (-2.0, tanh(-2.0));
UPDATE hyperbolic_tangents SET tanh_value = tanh(angle) WHERE angle > 0;
SELECT angle, tanh(angle) AS hyperbolic_tangent FROM hyperbolic_tangents WHERE id = 1;
